steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice gives the highest percentage of lithium recovered. The graph shows four bars: two battery types (A and B), each tested with two recycling processes (1 and 2). Find the tallest bar.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 45%.: 45% is below the tallest value, which is about 75%. ✗
  • Choice B — 75%.: This bar clearly reaches the 75% mark on the y-axis, the tallest of all four. ✓
  • Choice C — 20%.: 20% is far below the tallest value, which is about 75%. ✗
  • Choice D — 10%.: 10% is far below the tallest value, which is about 75%. ✗
That is the correct answer.
